hooks.command: powershell -NonInteractive -Command "[console]::beep(900,300); Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $n.Visible = $true; $n.ShowBalloonTip(5000,'Travel Journal Advisor','Claude needs your attention',[System.Windows.Forms.ToolTipIcon]::Info); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $n.Dispose()"
